text.title: Scope Management Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to produce + lock the scope baseline.

step.name: elicit
step.action: Collect requirements; ask explicitly for what is NOT wanted.

step.name: write
step.action: Draft scope statement with In/Out lists + testable AC.

step.name: sign
step.action: Walk sponsor through; capture signature + date.

step.name: baseline
step.action: Commit to repo / governance system; tag baseline version.

step.name: control
step.action: Every change passes the gate with cost + schedule impact analysis.
step.output: Approved / rejected changes; baseline version bumps recorded
